title: [W] Review additional claimants
p1: [W] We do not need any other details about the additional claimants or their claims.
p2: [W] You can add up to 5 people. If you need to add more than 5 claimants you can go back and use the spreadsheet upload option.
legend: [W] Do you want to add another claimant?

addAnotherClaimant.required: [W] Tell us if you want to add another claimant
